summary: Design update testing complete. All design changes from euroadria.me verified: green CTA button (#3eb489), white backgrounds, green active filter tabs, white content boxes with borders. All pages consistent with new design. One bug found in comments submission.

issues.description: Comment submission on Serbia Executive page fails. SerbiaExecutivePage passes articleId="serbia-executive-access" (string) to CommentsSection, but the backend API expects articleId as integer and requires articleSlug separately. The CommentsSection component also expects both articleId (int) and articleSlug (string) props.
issues.reproduction: 1. Go to /serbia-executive 2. Scroll to comments section 3. Fill form and submit 4. Error message appears: 'Ihr Kommentar konnte leider nicht gesendet werden'
issues.affected_test: serbia-executive.spec.ts:should submit comment - documents the bug behavior

issues.description: Executive Inquiry form submission is MOCKED - no backend endpoint exists. This is intentional per design but should be noted.

action_items: FIX BUG-001: Update SerbiaExecutivePage.jsx to pass correct props to CommentsSection: <CommentsSection articleId={0} articleSlug="serbia-executive" /> where articleId is a valid integer
